transcript: This is Tony. And Tony is having the best five seconds of his life.
summary: Tony stands confidently outside, grinning, completely unaware of what's about to happen.
prompt: A confident young man named Tony standing outside a restricted government research building at dusk, grinning, holding a skateboard, unaware of impending disaster.

transcript: He is behind a restricted government research building. There is a giant sign that says: AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY.
summary: A large warning sign reading AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY looms over the fenced research facility.
prompt: A massive warning sign reading AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY mounted on a chain-link fence around a government research building, dramatic evening lighting.

transcript: Tony sees the sign. Tony sees his skateboard. And Tony makes the kind of decision that changes history.
summary: Tony glances between the warning sign and his skateboard, deciding to attempt a trick anyway.
prompt: Close-up of Tony looking back and forth between a warning sign and his skateboard, a mischievous decision forming on his face, cinematic lighting.

transcript: He pushes forward. He jumps. The skateboard spins under his feet. For one beautiful moment, Tony looks like a professional.
summary: Tony launches into a skateboard trick, briefly looking like a professional skater mid-air.
prompt: Dynamic action shot of Tony mid-air on a skateboard performing a trick in front of a research facility, motion blur, dramatic angle.

transcript: Then his foot slips. The board shoots out from under him. It flies over a metal fence. Bounces off a warning sign. Smashes into a glowing electrical unit. And then... BZZZZZT.
summary: The runaway skateboard smashes into a glowing electrical control unit, triggering a massive electrical surge.
prompt: A skateboard flying through the air and crashing into a glowing electrical control unit, sparks and bright blue electrical surge, dramatic action moment.
